user.title: Connect to Sentinel
user.description: Enter your Sentinel Command Center URL and an integration key. Generate a key in the Command Center under Integrations.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sentinel
reauth_confirm.description: Your integration key was rejected. Generate a new one in the Command Center under Integrations and paste it here.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Command Center at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: That integration key was rejected (invalid or revoked).
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Sentinel organization is already configured.
